description: Lookup table containing the departments within the Adventure Works Cycles company.

columns.name: departmentid
columns.description: Primary key for Department records.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Name of the department.

columns.name: groupname
columns.description: Name of the group to which the department belongs.

description: Employee information such as salary, department, and title.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Primary key for Employee records.  Foreign key to BusinessEntity.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: nationalidnumber
columns.description: Unique national identification number such as a social security number.

columns.name: loginid
columns.description: Network login.

columns.name: jobtitle
columns.description: Work title such as Buyer or Sales Representative.

columns.name: birthdate
columns.description: Date of birth.

columns.name: maritalstatus
columns.description: M = Married, S = Single

columns.name: gender
columns.description: M = Male, F = Female

columns.name: hiredate
columns.description: Employee hired on this date.

columns.name: salariedflag
columns.description: Job classification. 0 = Hourly, not exempt from collective bargaining. 1 = Salaried, exempt from collective bargaining.

columns.name: vacationhours
columns.description: Number of available vacation hours.

columns.name: sickleavehours
columns.description: Number of available sick leave hours.

columns.name: currentflag
columns.description: 0 = Inactive, 1 = Active

columns.name: organizationnode
columns.description: Where the employee is located in corporate hierarchy.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Employee identification number. Foreign key to Employee.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: departmentid
columns.description: Department in which the employee worked including currently. Foreign key to Department.DepartmentID.

columns.name: shiftid
columns.description: Identifies which 8-hour shift the employee works. Foreign key to Shift.Shift.ID.

columns.name: startdate
columns.description: Date the employee started work in the department.

columns.name: enddate
columns.description: Date the employee left the department. NULL = Current department.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Employee identification number. Foreign key to Employee.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: ratechangedate
columns.description: Date the change in pay is effective

columns.name: rate
columns.description: Salary hourly rate.

columns.name: payfrequency
columns.description: 1 = Salary received monthly, 2 = Salary received biweekly

description: RÃ©sumÃ©s submitted to Human Resources by job applicants.

columns.name: jobcandidateid
columns.description: Primary key for JobCandidate records.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Employee identification number if applicant was hired. Foreign key to Employee.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: resume
columns.description: RÃ©sumÃ© in XML format.

columns.name: shiftid
columns.description: Primary key for Shift records.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Shift description.

columns.name: starttime
columns.description: Shift start time.

columns.name: endtime
columns.description: Shift end time.
